experience.title: Senior Sales Executive & Team Mentor (HR SaaS & Global Payroll)
experience.description:
"How I Went From Fear Of Cold-Calling To 6-Figure Deals" —and then I taught it as a mentor.

At ADP, I didn’t just start and hit the sales targets. I (l)earned it the hard way.…

The learning curve was a hard road. But it wasn’t luck.

It was a repeatable system I built on discipline, mindset, and ruthless execution. Here’s what that looked like:

---- The System Behind the Success: ---

1.	Pipeline Creation:
   -  Mapped 200+ target accounts by industry
   -  Researched market trends (SaaS, eLearning, logistics) to tailor pitches to industry-specific pain points
   -  Identified trigger events (e.g., mergers) that made prospects need us now

2.	Deal Leadership:
    -  Managed 6-figure cycles end-to-end, from first cold call to multi-CEO negotiations.
    -  Uncovered real objections (e.g., "We don’t have budget" = "You haven’t shown ROI").

3.	Coaching the Next Closers:
    -  Trained reps to demo only after diagnosing pain—cutting sales cycles by 30%.


--- What I Achieved Because Of My System: ---

•	#1 Sales Consultant (German Outbound Team): Closed the team’s first-ever global payroll deal (5-figures), then replicated it with a 6-figure deal—all through a self-generated pipeline.
•	48.4% Above Target by Month 4 (2021/22): While others relied on inbound leads, I owned the full cycle—prospecting, negotiating, and closing—with a consultative, no-BS approach.
•	Cold Calling Champion + Outbound Team Mentor (DACH & Poland): Turned cold outreach into a revenue engine by treating every call as a discovery session rather than a pitch.


--- The Mindset Shift That Made Everything Possible: ---

"Make everything about Them" meant acting as their new best business friend, not their vendor. In this way, I could position myself as the trusted authority, sitting on my prospects' site, not in front of them. That’s where the typical sales pros are fighting for the best seat.

I didn’t like the old way of sales, so I created a new one.

headline: International Business Development
about:
Hi there! Welcome to my LinkedIn profile!

I'm Albert Busquets, a multidisciplinary professional with experience across several industries: manufacturing, sports, music, and education. While these fields may seem different, I've found that success in any industry is built on connecting with people, building trust, and creating lasting relationships.

Along the journey, I realised that I am a creative and never-ending learner. I founded two companies that I am very proud of: UI Sports (2017) and Link Produccions (2006). Both are small-sized companies that have taught me valuable lessons across diverse fields: from sales and marketing to e-commerce and accounting. Now, I am bringing this experience to Balliu Export, where I support the company in various areas, including sales, marketing, digitisation, and business development.

Finally, I've always been obsessed with efficiency, which has made me organised, meticulous, and passionate about IT. I love how IT transforms tedious tasks into manageable ones. This led me to design four productivity apps, three of which I programmed myself. I learned Visual Basic for Access applications and am now studying Ruby on Rails to bring projects online. These skills give me a deeper understanding of software development, helping me lead Balliu Export’s digitisation efforts and standardise processes to make our teams more efficient, effective and productive.

Thanks for taking the time to learn about me! Feel free to connect, I’d love to hear from you.

Cheers,
Albert

experience.title: Director of Growth, Business Development & Partnerships
experience.description:
Appointed to lead Balliu Export’s global growth strategy following the successful opening of five strategic markets in 2025 (India, Australia, New Zealand, UAE, and Kuwait).
I lead the Growth, Business Development & Partnerships function, with a focus on diversifying revenue streams, flattening the manufacturing curve, and building scalable, long-term growth through strong distribution and strategic partnerships.
My role combines market expansion, organisational transformation, and partner development, working closely with the CEO to define ideal partner profiles, market entry methodology, and long-term expansion priorities.
I also lead the implementation of Salesforce across the organisation (Sales & Account Engagement), acting as administrator alongside the CEO and driving the design of sales pipelines, automation, and internal processes. This initiative is transforming how our sales and marketing teams collaborate, improving efficiency, productivity, data visibility, and enabling more structured, consistent, and impactful communication with partners, customers, and prospects globally.
In parallel, I oversee commercial operations across APAC and MEA, retain responsibility for other markets including the UK, Ukraine, Turkey, and Poland, and play an active role in shaping a global, partner-centric marketing strategy designed to accelerate market penetration in both existing and new territories.

What makes me different: I'm a former CTO with CISSP certification, which gives me technical credibility with the CISOs, CTOs, and engineering buyers who kill enterprise deals. Most revenue leaders scale by adding headcount linearly. I scale by redesigning how GTM teams operate, using data-driven insights and intelligent automation to multiply rep effectiveness. Faster growth with better unit economics.

At Equus, we closed 30+ enterprise deals with half the team size of competitors. At PKWARE, forecast improvements let our CFO redeploy $2M into growth. At Tehama, a 5-person sales team did what traditionally required 30+ reps.

I'm Chief Revenue Officer at CalliopeAI, building go-to-market strategy for an AI-native platform that enables enterprises to build autonomous agents for development, data operations, and workflow automation. We're defining the "Secure AI Workbench" category.

My experience at CalliopeAI building AI-native GTM combined with prior cybersecurity revenue leadership (Tehama, PKWARE, Broadwing) means I understand both sides: how to sell AI security solutions to CISOs AND how to position AI-powered features for technical buyers. Outside the office, I'm an adventure racer, proud father of three daughters, and lifelong learner. I met my wife competing in an Eco-Challenge expedition race in the Fijian jungle. I bring that same grit, curiosity, and teamwork into every business challenge.

Always happy to connect with fellow revenue leaders, founders, and operators building in SaaS, cybersecurity, and AI.
